templates.name: What is the width of your belts?
Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/gbrsgroup/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/gbrsgroupgear

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size? You can also take a look at our size chart on each product page.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to apply for wholesale is to go here: https://dealer.gbrsgroupgear.com/accounts/sign_up For other wholesale inquiries please email us at dealer@gbrsgroup.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at gear@gbrsgroup.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! Simply look for the ID.me verification at checkout as you complete your order. Click the "Verify" button and follow the steps!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://gbrsgroupgear.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: To request a return, please contact gear@gbrsgroup.com. We will send you instructions on how and where to send your package. Please note that items sent back to us without first requesting a return will not be accepted.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2-3 business days and we usually ship via USPS. Once shipped it will take 3-4 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Do you offer exchanges?
templates.content: The fastest way to ensure you get what you want is to return the item you have, and once the return is accepted, make a separate purchase for the new item.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at  gear@gbrsgroup.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Size Chart: Men - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our men's size chart here: https://gbrsgroupgear.com/en-af/pages/size-charts
